# SHA-256  filename  upstream URL
#
# These are the corresponding source archives for the statically linked
# libraries enabled in the two Martin Riedl FFmpeg 8.1.2 macOS binaries used
# by Open Video Craft 1.0.2. The release workflow refuses to publish unless
# every archive matches this manifest.
44bf90dbd23e734d50e70a8c41c285193922938bd0d3bc2ee56764d181d55ef5  aom-3.14.1.tar.gz  https://storage.googleapis.com/aom-releases/libaom-3.14.1.tar.gz
